data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether the setup/teardown time is included or added as per the requirement. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the inclusion of setup/teardown time in the booking process. The linked use case mentions that setup starts at 2pm and cleanup by midnight is included, but there is no direct evidence from API reads or persisted state checks that confirms this requirement is actively enforced or validated in the current saga run.
gaps: No evidence confirming that setup/teardown time is included or added in the booking process.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
